system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.stockbalances_getbywhs","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[STOCKBALANCES_GETBYWHS]
(
	@makho nvarchar(max)
)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT sb.WarehouseCode, sb.MaterialCode, sb.BatchNo, sb.Quantity,
		ISNULL(st.UnitPrice, 0) AS LastUnitPrice,
		sb.Quantity * ISNULL(st.UnitPrice, 0) AS InventoryValue,
		st.SupplierCode,
		sb.MaLoNguyenLieu2, sb.FscId, sb.NhomNguyenLieu,
		sb.ExpDate
	INTO #TONKHO
	FROM StockBalances sb
	OUTER APPLY (
		SELECT TOP 1 st.UnitPrice, st.SupplierCode
		FROM StockTransaction  st
		WHERE st.WarehouseCode = sb.WarehouseCode
			AND st.MaterialCode = sb.MaterialCode
			AND st.BatchNo = sb.BatchNo
			AND st.Quantity > 0
		ORDER BY st.TransactionDate 
	) st
	WHERE sb.Quantity > 0
		AND sb.WarehouseCode IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@makho, ','))

	SELECT A.WarehouseCode AS makho, C.[description] AS tenkho, 
		B.mavt, B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac, B.dvt, B.nhom, 
		A.BatchNo, 
		A.Quantity AS soluong_ton, 
		--A.LastUnitPrice, 
		--A.InventoryValue,
		dongia = CASE WHEN A.LastUnitPrice <= 0 THEN B.dongia ELSE A.LastUnitPrice END,
		giatritonkho = A.Quantity * CASE WHEN A.LastUnitPrice <= 0 THEN B.dongia ELSE A.LastUnitPrice END,
		B.loaitien, A.SupplierCode, D.vendor_name AS tenncc,
		FSC.fsc_name, GRM.nhomnguyenlieu, A.MaLoNguyenLieu2,
		A.ExpDate
	FROM #TONKHO A
		INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.MaterialCode = B.mavt
		LEFT JOIN tr_site C ON A.WarehouseCode = C.[name]
		LEFT JOIN tr_nhacc D ON A.SupplierCode = D.vendor_id
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc FSC ON A.FscId = FSC.fsc_id
		LEFT JOIN tr_nhom_nguyenlieu2 GRM ON A.NhomNguyenLieu = GRM.id

	DROP TABLE #TONKHO;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.stockbalances","dbo.stocktransaction","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_nhacc","dbo.tr_nhom_nguyenlieu2","dbo.tr_site","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
